title: Run venture product tracking
goal: Keep product milestone status current, transparent, and decision-ready for AJ.

steps.text: Review latest milestone status, blockers, and dependency changes.
Update status fields, risks, scope changes, and next actions.
Apply venture product quality gate and record result.
Escalate blocked or fail-gated milestones for AJ decision.

acceptanceCriteria: Status updates include what changed, blockers, and next action
Scope changes and approval status are explicit
Quality gate result is recorded for tracking output
Blocked work is escalated with decision request

verification.text: Confirm status update contract fields are populated for active milestones
Confirm blocked milestones include owner and unblock action
